note: Master catalog of papers referenced in the field guide. `key` is the canonical file/dir name (papers/pdfs/<key>.pdf, papers/md/<key>/). `ref` is the entry number in the guide. Status lifecycle: pending -> downloaded -> converted; or unavailable / download_failed. `verify` is a lowercase phrase expected in the first pages of the PDF (sanity check against grabbing the wrong paper).
